sql.up: ALTER TABLE projects ADD COLUMN status text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', ADD COLUMN status_changed_at timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT now(); ALTER TABLE branches ADD COLUMN status text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', ADD COLUMN status_changed_at timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT now(); DROP INDEX unique_org_project; DROP INDEX unique_project_branch_name; CREATE UNIQUE INDEX unique_org_project_active ON projects (organization_id, name) WHERE status = 'active'; CREATE UNIQUE INDEX unique_project_branch_name_active ON branches (project_id, name) WHERE status = 'active'
sql.down: DROP INDEX unique_org_project_active; DROP INDEX unique_project_branch_name_active; CREATE UNIQUE INDEX unique_org_project ON projects (organization_id, name); CREATE UNIQUE INDEX unique_project_branch_name ON branches (project_id, name); ALTER TABLE projects DROP COLUMN status, DROP COLUMN status_changed_at; ALTER TABLE branches DROP COLUMN status, DROP COLUMN status_changed_at
